Oracc: SAAo/SAA01 — The Correspondence of Sargon II, Part I: Letters from Assyria and the West

SAA 01 243. (no title) (CT 53 401)[via saao/saa01]

Obverse
oo beginning broken away

(Beginning destroyed)

o 1'1'

[ša LUGAL be-lí iš]-⸢pur-an-ni⸣

(1) [about whom the king, my lord, w]ote to me:

o 2'2'

[ma-a x x x]+⸢x⸣-MEŠ mu-ḫur-šu

(2) "Receive the [...]s from him!"

o 3'3'

[x x x x]+⸢x⸣ 02 GÌR-MEŠ

(3) [......] two feet

o 4'4'

[x x x x] šá-kín

(4) [......] set

o 5'5'

[x x x x a]-⸢sa⸣-ʾa-al-šú

(5) [...... I as]ked him

o 6'6'

[x x x x x x x] ⸢x⸣

rest broken away

(Break)

Reverse
rr beginning broken away

r 1'1'

[x x x x x] ⸢x⸣ [x]

r 2'2'

[x x UD x]-⸢KÁM⸣ a-[ṣa]-bat

(r 2) [......] I seized

r 3'3'

[x x x x] ina kas-pi

(r 3) [......] for money

r 4'4'

[x x x x] lid-din

(r 4) [......] he should sell

r 5'5'

[x x x x]-za-az

(r 5) [..... st]anding

r 6'6'

[x x mDÙG].GA-i

(r 6) [..... Ṭa]bî

r 7'7'

[x x x] iq-ṭi-bu-u-ni

(r 7) [.....] said to me.

r 8'8'

[is—su-ri] ⸢LUGAL⸣ be-lí i-qa-bi

(r 8) [Perhaps] the king, my lord, will say:

r 9'9'

[ma-a x x x x x x]-⸢i⸣

rest broken away

(Rest destroyed)

Adapted from Simo Parpola, The Correspondence of Sargon II, Part I: Letters from Assyria and the West (State Archives of Assyria, 1), 1987. Lemmatised by Mikko Luukko, 2009-11, as part of the AHRC-funded research project “Mechanisms of Communication in an Ancient Empire: The Correspondence between the King of Assyria and his Magnates in the 8th Century BC” (AH/F016581/1; University College London) directed by Karen Radner. The annotated edition is released under the Creative Commons Attribution Share-Alike license 3.0. Please cite this page as http://oracc.org/saao/P313815/.
